compounds.frequency: used multiple times, before social occasions and dates

benefits.description: Restored sex drive and urge to find a partner, increased motivation and drive
Made user more friendly and flirtatious, improved social interaction

protocol_notes: User with ADHD, only child, socially slow. Libido was previously suppressed by Adderall, work stress, and sleeplessness. Used PT-141 before social events and dates with friends present without inappropriate behavior noted. States every body reacts differently.
